title: Blinding Radiance
lines: You stare into the amethyst light. It burns with a cold, absolute intensity that sears your retinas, leaving floating, geometric after-images in your vision.
The light seems to reveal the 'under-structure' of the world—the chaotic, writhing patterns that lie beneath the illusion of reality.
Your eyes sting, but for a moment, you see the truth of the void, and it is more beautiful than anything you have ever known.

options.desc: Rub your eyes and step back
